_comment: Cloud-AI conversion settings. Copy to the per-user data dir and fill in your key. NEVER commit a real key. macOS: ~/Library/Application Support/RomajiIME/config.json   Windows: next to ime-server.exe (per its data dir).

_gemini_free_tier_example._note: Uses Google's OpenAI-compatible endpoint automatically. Free tier inputs may be used by Google to improve products — avoid for sensitive text.
